Dusty Sage.b3:
:root{
  --accent-light:  #BCCFC5;    /* palette chip sage - 淡め sage (palette identity) */
  --accent-darker: #3D5747;    /* sage derived dark-tone (L=29) - hover / gradient 終点 */
  --mid-light:     #E2D5D5;    /* palette chip dusty rose - 淡め rose (palette identity) */
  --mid-warm:      #E8E0D4;    /* warm cream - 暖系mid */
  --mid-cool:      #D5E2E2;    /* pale teal - 寒系mid */
  --accent-soft-2: #CFE0D6;    /* pale sage - 淡 */
  --mid-soft:      #ECECEC;    /* neutral - 極淡 */
  --surface-tint:  #E8E0D4;    /* cream tint (= --soft) */
  --neutral-cream: #F2F2EC;    /* palette chip 5 - off-white */
  --contrast-warm: #E2D5D5;    /* dusty rose - 暖系contrast */
  --contrast-cool: #D5E2E2;    /* pale teal - 寒系contrast */
}

Antique Pearl.b3:
:root{
  --accent-light:  #D4B5C4;    /* palette chip 1 - 淡め mauve (palette identity) */
  --accent-darker: #B8849D;    /* chip 1 derived mid-tone mauve (L=62) - hover / gradient 終点 */
  --mid-light:     #D9E5E5;    /* palette chip 3 - 淡め teal (palette identity) */
  --mid-warm:      #E8D4DC;    /* pale rose - 暖系mid */
  --mid-cool:      #D4E2E2;    /* pale teal - 寒系mid */
  --accent-soft-2: #E0CFD9;    /* lavender mauve - 淡 */
  --mid-soft:      #ECECEC;    /* neutral - 極淡 */
  --surface-tint:  #E8E4DC;    /* cream tint (= --light) */
  --neutral-cream: #F2E6E6;    /* (= --base) */
  --contrast-warm: #E8B5B5;    /* pale rose - 暖系contrast */
  --contrast-cool: #B8DCD4;    /* pale mint - 寒系contrast */
}

Rose Mist.b3:
:root{
  --accent-light:  #F4ACB7;    /* palette chip 3 rose - 淡め rose (palette identity) */
  --accent-darker: #8C3D4E;    /* rose derived dark-tone (L=39) - hover / gradient 終点 */
  --mid-light:     #AAD1B0;    /* Mint Tea chip 1 - 淡め sage (借用 chip identity) */
  --mid-warm:      #E8D6D7;    /* palette chip 4 pale rose-gray - 暖系mid */
  --mid-cool:      #C3DBC5;    /* Mint Tea chip 4 pale sage - 寒系mid */
  --accent-soft-2: #F5D4D4;    /* palette chip 2 pale rose - 淡 */
  --mid-soft:      #ECECEC;    /* neutral - 極淡 */
  --surface-tint:  #FFE8E8;    /* pale pink tint (= --light) */
  --neutral-cream: #F2E6E6;    /* 淡クリームローズ */
  --contrast-warm: #E8D6D7;    /* pale rose-gray - 暖系contrast */
  --contrast-cool: #C3DBC5;    /* pale sage - 寒系contrast */
}

Sweet Berry.b3:
:root{
  --accent-light:  #E8B4BC;    /* palette chip 2 - 淡め berry (palette identity) */
  --accent-darker: #8A4A58;    /* chip 2 derived mid-tone berry (L=42) - hover / gradient 終点 */
  --mid-light:     #D4E2E9;    /* palette chip 3 - 淡め blue (palette identity) */
  --mid-warm:      #F2D4D7;    /* pale pink - 暖系mid */
  --mid-cool:      #D4E2E9;    /* pale blue - 寒系mid */
  --accent-soft-2: #F0C8CF;    /* rose pink - 淡 */
  --mid-soft:      #ECECEC;    /* neutral - 極淡 */
  --surface-tint:  #E8E4E4;    /* cream tint (= --light) */
  --neutral-cream: #F7F1E9;    /* (= --base) */
  --contrast-warm: #F2D4D7;    /* pale pink - 暖系contrast */
  --contrast-cool: #D4E2E9;    /* pale blue - 寒系contrast */
}

Fresh Citrus.b3:
:root{
  --accent-light:  #F2D6C9;    /* palette chip 3 - 淡め peach (palette identity) */
  --accent-darker: #8F4A2C;    /* deep terracotta (L=37) - hover / gradient 終点 */
  --mid-light:     #D9EBE8;    /* palette chip 4 - 淡め mint (palette identity) */
  --mid-warm:      #F2D6C9;    /* pale peach - 暖系mid */
  --mid-cool:      #D9EBE8;    /* pale mint - 寒系mid */
  --accent-soft-2: #F4DDCB;    /* peach - 淡 */
  --mid-soft:      #ECECEC;    /* neutral - 極淡 */
  --surface-tint:  #EFE9DC;    /* cream tint (= --light) */
  --neutral-cream: #F7F1E9;    /* (= --base) */
  --contrast-warm: #F2D6C9;    /* pale peach - 暖系contrast */
  --contrast-cool: #D9EBE8;    /* pale mint - 寒系contrast */
}

Crystal Blue.b3:
:root{
  --accent-light:  #C7D9DD;    /* Crystal Blue chip 1 derived - 淡め teal-blue (palette identity) */
  --accent-darker: #345A66;    /* chip 1 derived mid-tone teal (L=45) - hover / gradient 終点 */
  --mid-light:     #E6C2CC;    /* dusty rose - 淡め (palette identity) */
  --mid-warm:      #E6C2CC;    /* pale rose - 暖系mid */
  --mid-cool:      #D8E6EA;    /* pale teal - 寒系mid */
  --accent-soft-2: #CFDFE3;    /* teal-blue - 淡 */
  --mid-soft:      #ECECEC;    /* neutral - 極淡 */
  --surface-tint:  #E8EEEE;    /* teal tint (= --light) */
  --neutral-cream: #F7F1E9;    /* (= --base) */
  --contrast-warm: #E6C2CC;    /* pale rose - 暖系contrast */
  --contrast-cool: #D8E6EA;    /* pale teal - 寒系contrast */
}

Sunset Harmony.b3:
:root{
  --accent-light:  #D4C6E2;    /* palette chip 3 - 淡め violet (palette identity) */
  --accent-darker: #7E4860;    /* mauve-rose derived mid-tone (L=39) - hover / gradient 終点 */
  --mid-light:     #D4C6E2;    /* palette chip 3 - 淡め violet (palette identity) */
  --mid-warm:      #E8B5B5;    /* pale rose (chip 2) - 暖系mid */
  --mid-cool:      #D4C6E2;    /* pale violet - 寒系mid */
  --accent-soft-2: #DECFE2;    /* lavender violet - 淡 */
  --mid-soft:      #ECECEC;    /* neutral - 極淡 */
  --surface-tint:  #F7E8D6;    /* cream tint (= --light) */
  --neutral-cream: #F7F1E9;    /* (= --base) */
  --contrast-warm: #E8B5B5;    /* pale rose - 暖系contrast */
  --contrast-cool: #D4C6E2;    /* pale violet - 寒系contrast */
}

Maison Blanche.b3:
:root{
  --accent-light:  #E8D4DC;    /* palette chip 1 - 淡め rose-mauve (palette identity) */
  --accent-darker: #7E5468;    /* chip 1 derived deep mauve (L=42) - hover / gradient 終点（白文字 contrast 維持） */
  --mid-light:     #D2E4E4;    /* palette chip 2 - 淡め teal (palette identity) */
  --mid-warm:      #E9DCE3;    /* pale mauve - 暖系mid */
  --mid-cool:      #D2E4E4;    /* pale teal - 寒系mid */
  --accent-soft-2: #E0CFDA;    /* dusty mauve - 淡 */
  --mid-soft:      #ECECEC;    /* neutral - 極淡 */
  --surface-tint:  #E6E2E4;    /* gray-mauve tint (= --light) */
  --neutral-cream: #F7F1E9;    /* (= --base) */
  --contrast-warm: #E9DCE3;    /* pale mauve - 暖系contrast */
  --contrast-cool: #D2E4E4;    /* pale teal - 寒系contrast */
}

Twilight Violet.b3:
:root{
  --accent-light:  #E2D4E2;    /* palette chip 1 - 淡め violet (palette identity) */
  --accent-darker: #7D5E8A;    /* chip 1 derived mid-tone violet (L=45) - hover / gradient 終点 */
  --mid-light:     #D4E2E2;    /* palette chip 4 - 淡め teal (palette identity) */
  --mid-warm:      #E8D4D4;    /* pale rose - 暖系mid */
  --mid-cool:      #D4E2E2;    /* pale teal - 寒系mid */
  --accent-soft-2: #DECFE2;    /* lavender violet - 淡 */
  --mid-soft:      #ECECEC;    /* neutral - 極淡 */
  --surface-tint:  #F7EBD6;    /* cream tint (= --light) */
  --neutral-cream: #F6EFF6;    /* (= --base) */
  --contrast-warm: #E8D4D4;    /* pale rose - 暖系contrast */
  --contrast-cool: #D4E2E2;    /* pale teal - 寒系contrast */
}
